title: Mottu Mottu Malartha Mottu Lyrics Kadhal Kottai
stanzas: <div>Mottu Mottu Malartha Mottu Lyrics Kadhal Kottai

Mottu mottu malartha mottu
kattu kattu enai alli kattu
ottu ottu idhazhodu ottu
sittu sittu singaara sittu

aanazhagaa un adimai ingae
ne thaenalli thoovida vaa.
thol irandil ye ilankili naan
ne thinam thinam koodida vaa

Mottu mottu malartha mottu
kattu kattu enai alli kattu
hoi...

Tamizh tharum suvai ena
un vaai mozhi ketten
adhu tharum sugam ena
vizhi paarvaiyai paarppen

undhan kaiyyil pennaaga vendum
unnaal pennai panpaada vendum
ondrum ondrum moondraaga vendum
endrum neeye naanaaga vendum

Ilakkiyam enadhudale va ne va
ilakkanam unadhuruve thaa nee tha
dheva!!

aanazhagaa un adimai ingae
ne thaenalli thoovida vaa
thol irandil ye ilankili naan
ne thinam thinam koodida vaa

Enai thodu varam kodu
uyir vazhndhida ketten
malar udal manam thira
thinam dhevanai paarppen

penmai endrum unnodu thanjam
pennil inbam kondaada mandrum
mutham ennum nithaadhu nitham
nitham nitham piththaana sitham

ilamaiyin ragasiyame vaa nee vaa
idhu thinam aasiyame thaa nee thaa
dheva!!

aanazhagaa un adimai ingae
ne thaenalli thoovida vaa.
thol irandil ye ilankili naan
ne thinam thinam koodida vaa

Mottu mottu malartha mottu
kattu kattu enai alli kattu
ottu ottu idhazhodu ottu
sittu sittu singaara sittu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Kadhal Kottai, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings towards their love interest, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Swarnalatha and composed by Deva.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 12, 1996.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mottu Mottu Malartha Mottu, the lyrics beautifully convey the feelings of love and yearning, making it a quintessential romantic ballad. The song plays a significant role in Kadhal Kottai, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationship. With its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery by Swarnalatha, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track remains a favorite among fans of Tamil cinema, symbolizing the timeless nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mottu Mottu Malartha Mottu from Kadhal Kottai is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Swarnalatha's enchanting vocals and Deva's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of romance. Dive into this nostalgic track that beautifully blends emotion with melody, making it a must-listen for every Tamil music lover.
stanzaMeanings: Round, round, the round one, tie me up, tie me up, let the drops fall, let the sweet sounds come.
Oh beautiful one, your servant is here, come and sprinkle me with honey. In the two corners, like a beautiful bird, come and stay with me every day.
Round, round, the round one, tie me up, tie me up, oh...
I heard your words that give the taste of Tamil, I will see your gaze that gives happiness.
You need to be a girl in your hands, you need to make a girl dance, one by one, three by three, you must always be me.
Literature is mine, you are the example, you are the one, oh God!!
Oh beautiful one, your servant is here, come and sprinkle me with honey. In the two corners, like a beautiful bird, come and stay with me every day.
Grant me the boon to live with you, I will see the divine in the flower-like body every day.
The bond of femininity is always with you, the joy of a girl dances, kisses are never-ending, always, always, always, the crazy love.
Come, oh secret of youth, come, this is the day of desire, oh God!!
Oh beautiful one, your servant is here, come and sprinkle me with honey. In the two corners, like a beautiful bird, come and stay with me every day.
Round, round, the round one, tie me up, tie me up, let the drops fall, let the sweet sounds come.
